## Summary

Describe the change and the problem it solves.

## Validation

- [ ] `npm run build`
- [ ] `npm run lint`
- [ ] `npm test`
- [ ] `python plugin/tests/test_bridge.py`
- [ ] Relevant manual or end-to-end validation

## Notes

- Bridge protocol changed: yes / no
- Docs updated: yes / no
- Windows-only assumptions or debugger-specific constraints:

## Checklist

- [ ] The change is focused and does not include unrelated cleanup
- [ ] User-facing behavior or tooling changes are documented
- [ ] No machine-specific paths, tokens, or local environment details were committed
